data.name: 惡靈寄生
data.detailed_description:
★已知部分防毒軟體可能會影響遊戲正常運行，
為確保購買遊戲的正常遊玩，建議遊玩前可以暫時將防毒軟體關閉，感謝您的配合！


◆故事背景


在一場災難中，主角們被送往一間正進行神秘研究的醫院之中。
雖然成功的存活下來但隨之而來的是那瘋狂的異變，主角們將在理智和肉體都被侵蝕的醫院之中逃離。

◆遊戲特色與玩法


以2D橫向卷軸的動作遊戲進行，你必須善用手上的道具生存下去，豎起你的耳朵躲避怪物，隱藏自己的蹤跡，或是使用手上的武器拚死一搏。

面對醫院中的各種謎團，你必須尋找事件的真相和逃離醫院的方法。

本遊戲採用全動態CG製作，包含角色立繪以及各種H事件，隨著經驗次數的增加，將會開放更多的事件以及不同的對話。



◇橫向卷軸射擊遊戲
◇多種道具,豐富的解謎小遊戲完美呈現醫院密室逃脫
◇互動H模式,隨心所欲上下其手!

*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1.7+ GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX9 Support, 2GB GPU RAM
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX9.0c compatible
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1.7+ GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX9 Support, 2GB GPU RAM
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX9.0c compatible

data.name: Parasitic Evil
data.detailed_description:
★ It is known that some anti-virus software may affect the normal operation of the game.
In order to ensure the operation of the purchased game, it is recommended to temporarily turn off the anti-virus software before playing, thank you for your cooperation!


◆Background Story


In the aftermath of a disaster, the protagonists are brought into a hospital involved in enigmatic research.

Despite surviving the ordeal, they are now faced with deranged transformations; they must escape from the hospital which threatens to erode their minds and bodies.

◆Game Features and Gameplay


Evil Spirit Parasitism is a 2D side-scrolling action game, where your survival relies on utilizing various items at hand. Listen keenly to avoid monsters, conceal your tracks, or bravely fight with the available weapons.

As you encounter diverse mysteries within the hospital, you must seek the truth behind the events and find a way to escape.

The game employs fully dynamic CG production, featuring character illustrations and a variety of erotic or obscene events as content. With increasing experience, more events and dialog will unlock.



◇ Side-scrolling shooter gameplay
◇ Multiple items and intriguing puzzle mini-games, providing a perfect escape from the hospital's enclosed rooms.
◇ Interactive, erotic content, allowing players to engage freely in intimate encounters.

data.short_description: Amidst a catastrophe, the protagonists find themselves trapped inside a hospital that has been conducting mysterious research. While they manage to survive the initial disaster, they are soon confronted with insane mutations—and the struggle to escape the hospital which leaves both their sanity and physical forms under siege.
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, English, Turkish, Japanese*, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support

Minimum:

  • Memory: 2 GB RAM

  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX9.0c compatible
